{{Quote|We hear the Jedi have arrived on Mawan with a Provisional Committee from the Senate ... Foolish beings—they think they can get rid of us ... They will regret coming up against Decca the Hutt. I vow to you today, no committee will blast me off this planet! Tell the galaxy—Decca will never retreat!|Decca Besadii Diori, to her crony-revelers|<ref name="Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap">''[[Jedi Quest: The Shadow Trap]]''</ref>}}
'''Decca Besadii Diori''', also known as '''Decca the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]''', was daughter of [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]] and the sister of [[Gardulla Besadii the Younger]].

==Biography==
After her mother's supposed death in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Decca inherited Gardulla's fortune. Decca started a fleet made up of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and thugs. For a time, Decca's center of operations was on [[C-Foroon]], near [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], until she was chased offworld. She then relocated her thugs, goons, and cronies, together with her operations, principally in the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trade, to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mawan/Legends|Mawan]].

Shortly before [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], a civil war erupted on Mawan. Decca took advantage of the chance to take Mawan for the Hutts, but two rival gangs, one led by [[Feeana Tala]] and the other by [[Granta Omega|Striker]], were already fighting for the food and water supply on the planet. Decca held a personal grudge against Striker, who hit her operation when she first arrived on the planet, managing to seize the capital city's power grid and a large cache of weapons, while Decca was able to hold on to [[Naatan]]'s main tunnels and transports. Striker, however, continued to strike, to keep all the fuel away from Decca, making her even more angry. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led by Master [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]], Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] [[Mission to Mawan|disrupted]] the civil war.

But things went from bad to worse when the Jedi arrived. Decca was celebrating a victory against Striker's gang at one of her "revels" when Obi-Wan, Anakin, and two of Tala's associates, [[Swanny Mull]] and [[Rorq]], infiltrated the Hutt's stronghold. In the thick of the party, after [[Swanny and the Rooters]] had played their music and Decca had given a speech, Striker's force ambushed the Hutt compound and attacked her gang.

Soon after, however, Decca allied herself with Striker, who of all the crimelords was considered the most powerful and dangerous, to stop the Jedi. While Decca distracted Obi-Wan and Anakin, Striker, ''aka'' [[Granta Omega]], killed Master Yaddle and was able to escape the planet.
